prompt: 4th and 5th buildings on Susquehanna Street. The photo extravaganza
generation:
4th and 5th buildings on Susquehanna Avenue.  The
project is expected to be complete by the end of 2001.

The project will provide a new, modern, energy efficient building for
the company.  The new building will be approximately 1,000,000 square feet
and will include approximately 1,000 square feet of office space.  The
project will also include approximately 1,000 square feet of retail space.

The project will be located in the heart of downtown Pittsburgh,
approximately one block from the new Heinz Field baseball stadium.

The project is being developed by the Pittsburgh-based architecture
consulting firm of Skidmore, Owings & Merrill (SOM).  The SOM team is
responsible for the design and construction of the new Enron Building in
Houston, the new Enron Center South in St. Louis, and the new Enron Center
North in Atlanta.  The SOM team also designed the new Enron Building in
Houston and the new Enron Center South in St. Louis.

For more information about the project, please contact:

David W. Lassman
Senior Director, Corporate Communications
(412) 466-6200
dwassman@som.com

The Role-Playing Game Community

The Role-Playing Game Community is a group of individuals who share a common interest in role-playing games.  The primary focus of the community is to provide a forum for role-players to share their experiences, discuss their favorite games, and exchange ideas.  The community also organizes regular role-playing game events, such as the Role-Playing Game Convention, which has been held annually since 1996.

The Role-Playing Game Community is a non-profit organization.  All donations are tax deductible.

than a decade in business, we are proud to announce that we have 
reached a definitive agreement to acquire EnronOnline, the leading 
electronic trading platform for energy and other commodities. 

EnronOnline is a leading provider of real-time and historical energy and 
commodity prices, and is the leading online platform for energy and 
commodity derivatives. 

The transaction is expected to close in the third quarter of 2001. 

We are pleased to have been able to bring EnronOnline to Enron, and we look 
forward to working with the team to continue to expand our presence in 
the energy and financial markets. 

We will continue to provide more information as it becomes available.Message-ID: <24098272.1075859989731.JavaMail.evans@thyme>

Koerkamp Max de Goede Monique Ixelles

I am writing to you to inform you that I have been appointed as the new
Director of the European Office of the World Bank.  I am very excited about
this opportunity and I look forward to working with you and the
Enron Europe team.

I am currently based in Washington DC and will be moving to Brussels
in the coming weeks.  I will be in contact with you shortly to discuss
my role and to arrange a meeting to discuss the World Bank's work in
Brussels.

I look forward to meeting you and I hope to see you in Washington DC
in the near future.

Regards,

Maxime

Chief Operating Officer.  John has been with Enron for over 15 years, most 
recently as Vice President, Corporate Development.  Prior to joining Enron, 
John was Vice President, Corporate Development for Enron Broadband Services 
(EBS), where he was responsible for the development of the company's 
broadband services business.  John has also been a member of the board of directors 
for Enron Broadband Services since its inception.  John will report to 
the Office of the Chairman.
